items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Capacity allocation (reserve X spots for ClassPass)', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for capacity allocation, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this functionality being tested or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
